title: IPv6 and Modern Programmable Networks · Packet Forensics
summary: Extend the branch design for IPv6, centralized policy, overlays, zero trust, SASE, and infrastructure as code. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a dual-stack and programmable-network transition plan and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Compress, expand, classify, and subnet IPv6 addresses and prefixes without inventing IPv4 broadcast behavior.
Distinguish global unicast, link-local, unique local, multicast, anycast, loopback, and unspecified IPv6 addresses.
Explain SLAAC, router advertisements, DHCPv6 choices, neighbor discovery, and default-gateway learning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Net Infrastructure Code evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Net Infrastructure Code assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Use a changed debug case for network ipv6 modern that tests this competency: Manage network templates, playbooks, inventories, source control, review, conflict, drift, upgrade, and rollback evidence.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Net Infrastructure Code has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Automation removes the need for change review because templates are repeatable.
